meaning: adj.(鏄嗚櫕鑵归儴)鏈夎壊甯︾幆缁曠殑
examples: The anterior cingulate cortex was activated considerably more in the former than in the latter.
We know [the cingulate cortex] is important for controlling emotion and dealing with environmental adversity.
These differences were noticeable in two regions: the amygdalas and the perigenual anterior cingulate cortex (pACC).
The researchers found the biggest differences in activity in the posterior cingulate cortex.
Another suggests hypnotherapy may have an impact on a part of the brain which processes pain called the anterior cingulate cortex (ACC).
